name: io.github.fatomate/onpay-mcp
description: MCP server for the OnPay API — query sales records and update shipping info from any MCP client.

environmentVariables.name: ONPAY_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: OnPay API token from Tetapan > Sistem > API & Webhook.

environmentVariables.name: ONPAY_ACCOUNT
environmentVariables.description: Account subdomain (the 'acme' in https://acme.onpay.my). Provide this OR ONPAY_BASE_URL.

environmentVariables.name: ONPAY_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Full API base URL for a custom domain, e.g. https://shop.example.com/api/v1. Provide this OR ONPAY_ACCOUNT.
